chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Guardian, Witnesses, Proposal, and Dowry

text: 4400 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنْ تَزَوَّجَ اِمْرَأَةً وَ لَمْ يَنْوِ أَنْ يُوَفِّيَهَا صَدَاقَهَا فَهُوَ عِنْدَ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ زَانٍ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4400 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever marries a woman and does not intend to pay her dowry is, in the sight of Allah (swt), the Almighty and Glorious, considered a fornicator."
